title: Pregnant mother with a young child needing nutrition and facility help
scenario_text: I live in pincode 560001. I am pregnant and I also have a 3-year-old child. I do not know where to go for affordable health services. I need help with nutrition for my child and finding a nearby health facility.

title: Parent with child needing vaccination and a nearby healthcare facility
scenario_text: I have a 1-year-old baby in pincode 560001 and I want to make sure my child gets all the required vaccinations. Where is the closest place I can take my child for immunization?

title: Field worker reviewing district-level health risk and facility gaps
scenario_text: I am a field worker covering pincode 560001. I want to understand the district-level health risks for mothers and children, see which support pathways are most in demand, and find where facility coverage or contact information is missing.
